title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers to automate daily tasks and workflows. It can interact with files, emails, calendars, and connected applications to orchestrate complex automation scenarios. The feature is available in Claude Pro and Max subscription plans.
